scope.target: Expand Stage 4 with more real use-case specs and establish a dedicated test-spec area for BDD/TDD workflows
constraints: Use .dev/test-specs/ for test intent, scenario design, and red-green-refactor planning rather than duplicating production behavior specs
Only describe use cases and test-spec structure that are verifiable from the current codebase and workflow goals
non_goals: Do not generate concrete test code in this task
Do not fully populate every bounded context with test scenarios yet

inputs.architecture_target: Stage 4 should cover more of the current active use cases and create a stable documentation home for BDD/TDD-oriented test specifications.
review_findings: Stage 4 first batch covered only the minimum set of active contexts.
BDD/TDD workflows need a place to store scenario-level test intent without overloading production specs.
user_constraints: Evaluate whether a dedicated test spec area should exist for BDD/TDD development.

steps: Add more implementation-facing use-case specs for currently implemented commands.
Create a dedicated .dev/test-specs area with rules for BDD/TDD-oriented test specifications.
Clarify the boundary between production specs and test specs.
validation: Additional active commands now have matching use-case specs.
The repository now contains a dedicated test-spec area for BDD/TDD workflows.
The test-spec guide clearly separates scenario-level test intent from implementation-facing production specs.
deferred_items: Concrete scenario files per use case in .dev/test-specs/.
Linking each production spec to a corresponding test spec.

results.summary: Expanded Stage 4 with additional use-case specs and created a dedicated .dev/test-specs area for BDD/TDD-oriented test specifications.
